prompt: Change the color and darken all cell edges from the edge map.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1, the photorealistic microscopic image of cells. Change the current color of the cell bodies (the internal, non-edge parts of each cell) to a new, different color. Concurrently, using the contours precisely outlined in Image 2 (the edge map) to locate them, darken all corresponding cell edges within Image 1.
objects: Cell bodies with a new color
Circular cell cluster in the center
